content: By integrating online meta-learning catastrophic forgetting mitigation techniques (specifically Neural ODE-augmented memory consolidation) into the 2025 generation of ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agents, we can solve the longstanding problem of ICM agents forgetting previously explored novel environments and re-wasting exploration cycles on already-discovered states. This approach repurposes knowledge distillation for forgetting mitigation to consolidate the ICM's learned inverse dynamics model of novel states as the agent explores incrementally in open-ended lifelong environments.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
trigger_topic: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
